author: driver--design-phase-4a-render-md-0c67
content: Plan: Implementing vitreous_render with 6 source files + 4 WGSL shaders. Order: (1) commands.rs - RenderCommand enum + generation, (2) atlas.rs - glyph/image atlas with shelf packing, (3) pipeline.rs - wgpu pipeline + batching + stencil clipping, (4) WGSL shaders for rect/text/image/shadow, (5) damage.rs + diff.rs - damage tracking and frame diffing, (6) lib.rs - Renderer struct wiring everything together. Will add vitreous_style dependency for Color/Shadow/Corners types.
